description.en: Undo (repeatedly) the last turtle action(s). Number of available undo actions is determined by the size of the undobuffer. >>> for i in range(4): ... turtle.fd(50); turtle.lt(80) ... >>> for i in range(8): ... turtle.undo()

excerpt.es: Undo (repeatedly) the last turtle action(s). Number of available undo actions is determined by the size of the undobuffer. >>> for i in range(4): ... turtle.fd(50); turtle.lt(80) ... >>> for i in rang...

description.en: Return number of entries in the undobuffer. >>> while undobufferentries(): ... undo()

description.en: Perform a TurtleScreen update. To be used when tracer is turned off.
